blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,880 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F, gusts to 43 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
